darkvision.name: Darkvision
darkvision.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light.

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.description: You can use a Bonus Action to regain Hit Points equal to 1d10 plus your Fighter level.

tough_feature.name: Tough (Benefit)
tough_feature.description: Your Hit Point maximum increases by an amount equal to twice your level.
